song.title: The Church is Christ's Deep Longing
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) The Church is Christ’s deep longing And His good pleasure, too. His every word and action Is made with her in view.|| His heart’s love is established, And naught can Him deter. Before the earth’s foundation His thoughts were filled with her.
[V2] 2) The eve of all creation He mused on His delight And pondered every feature Well-pleasing in His sight.|| Creation sprang to being Proclaiming far and wide A mind of depth unfathomed Fixed on a glorious Bride.
[V3] 3) And thus His will was ’stablished His counterpart to gain. This fixed and firm intention, Eternally the same.|| Though Sin should e’en beguile her, Then mock her helpless state, He never could forsake her, His yearning ne’er abate.
[V4] 4) But mercy richly flowed, for His love was, oh, so vast, As graciously He sought her With kindness unsurpassed.|| The love which gently drew her— What mind can comprehend! Laid down His life, an off’ring; Sweet fragrance yet ascends.
[V5] 5) And now in resurrection To her He draws most near; His own heart’s love He pours out Into her heart so dear.|| As she beholds her Bridegroom, His glory floods her heart, Till she, His bride, is raptured, His longed-for counterpart.
song.author: Thomas J. Neill
